title: vvp: how to `push` into an instance in a `generate` block?

features.name: generate for loop with named begin and module instantiation
features.description: Code should include a generate for-loop with a named begin block that instantiates a module, where the generate index is used to select an instance from an array of wires

features.name: conditional assign inside generate block
features.description: Code should include a conditional continuous assignment inside a generate block that uses the generate index variable for the condition

features.name: localparam sizing unpacked array for generate-driven signals
features.description: Code should include a localparam used to size unpacked wire arrays that are driven by generate-for instantiated modules
